name: integration__people_who_actually_make_money_with_aff
method: people who actually make money with affiliate marketing, can i ask you something?

phases.name: generate_hooks
steps: generate 5 question-format hooks targeting affiliate marketers, ecom sellers, content creators using template: 'people who actually [verb] with [method], can I ask you something?'
vary niches: affiliate, dropshipping, SaaS, content monetization, freelancing

phases.name: post_and_monitor
steps: post hooks to Twitter/Reddit/indie hacker communities via posting queue
monitor replies for 48h using background_reddit_scraper and twitter_alpha_scraper

phases.name: extract_and_route
steps: scrape reply threads for specific methods, tools, revenue numbers
route APPROVE entries to ALPHA_STAGING, CONTENT_ONLY to posting_queue
